task_completion.description: Verify that a folder named 'Postmortem-Evidence' has been created in the email client.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the folder pane or sidebar in the email client for a folder named 'Postmortem-Evidence' (or containing the words 'postmortem' or 'evidence').

task_completion.description: Verify that at least 8 relevant emails discussing technical issues have been moved into the 'Postmortem-Evidence' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the 'Postmortem-Evidence' folder. The message list should display at least 8 emails, and their subjects should relate to software bugs, errors, patches, or system failures.

task_completion.description: Verify that an email draft has been created and is addressed to the correct recipient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open email composition window or a saved draft where the 'To' field contains exactly 'postmortem@sre-team.org'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the drafted email body contains timeline-related terminology.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the body of the drafted email and look for at least one of these keywords: 'timeline', 'chronolog', 'sequence', 'order', 'incident', or 'reconstruction'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the drafted email body references specific issues found in the collected emails to form a chronological report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Read the body of the drafted email. It should list specific software bugs, errors, or system failures, specifically including phrases that match the subjects of the collected emails, structured as a timeline.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical email client to create folders, move emails, and draft the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GUI of an email client being actively used for folder creation and email composition, rather than terminal windows executing commands like 'mv' or 'echo'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual provided inbox rather than typing fake email subjects.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inbox or 'Postmortem-Evidence' folder should show real email headers and subjects from a mailing list, not manually typed placeholder text.

integrity.description: The timeline report is drafted within the email client's composition window.
integrity.visual_evidence: The draft should be visible in an email composition window with standard email fields (To, Subject, Body), not in a separate text editor like gedit, nano, or a terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target folder name: 'Postmortem-Evidence' (or must contain 'postmortem' or 'evidence'). Target recipient: 'postmortem@sre-team.org'. Minimum number of relevant emails to move: 8. The drafted email must contain at least one of the following keywords: 'timeline', 'chronolog', 'sequence', 'order', 'incident', 'reconstruction'. The draft must also reference specific issues (2-word phrases) from the collected email subjects.
